caption: The video captures a group of individuals, likely athletes or team members, disembarking from a large bus adorned with various sponsor logos such as Audi, Hankook, and Adidas. The scene is set outdoors, with palm trees and modern architecture visible in the background, suggesting a warm, possibly coastal location. As the individuals exit the bus, they are seen wearing casual attire, including t-shirts, jeans, and backpacks, along with face masks, indicating adherence to health protocols. They proceed towards a building, walking in an orderly manner, while some fans or onlookers can be seen in the distance, capturing the moment. The atmosphere appears calm and organized, reflecting a routine event, possibly before or after a sports match or training session.
